command: echo === CURRENT DIR === && cd && echo === .ENV EXISTS? === && if exist .env (echo YES .env found) else (echo NO .env not found) && echo === LOCAL OUTBOX FILES === && if exist outbox\*.json (dir /b outbox\*.json) else (echo no local outbox files) && echo === BRIDGE RUNNING? === && tasklist /fi "imagename eq python.exe" /fo list
description: Diagnostic: check cwd, .env existence, local outbox files, bridge process
